scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev --workspace @bmp/api" "npm run dev --workspace @bmp/web"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @bmp/api && npm run build --workspace @bmp/web
scripts.perf:smoke:web: npm run build --workspace @bmp/web && npm run perf:smoke --workspace @bmp/web
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @bmp/api && npm run test --workspace @bmp/web
